---
title: Exercise UX polish test fixture
filters: [../_extensions/blendtutor/blendtutor.lua]
---

## Exercise UX Polish Test

### Exercise 1: Full exercise (hints + solution + checks)

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Write a function `add(a, b)` that returns the sum.

```r
add <- function(a, b) { ___ }
```

```{.r .checks}
stopifnot(add(1, 2) == 3)
```

```{.r .solution}
a + b
```

::: {.hints}
- Use the `<-` operator to assign the function body.
- The last expression is the return value.
:::
:::

### Exercise 2: No checks (check button absent)

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Print a greeting to the console.

```r
print("hello world")
```
:::

### Exercise 3: Empty exercise (no solution, no hints, no checks)

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Write any R expression below.
:::

<script type="module">
  import { scanExercises, buildRegistry, start } from "../_extensions/blendtutor/assets/exercise-runtime.js";
  import { createMockAdapter } from "../tests/fixtures/mock-adapter.js";

  const adapter = createMockAdapter();
  const registry = buildRegistry(scanExercises());
  window.__btTestAdapter = adapter;
  start(registry, adapter);
</script>
